map_comp✝ : ∀ {X Y Z : C} (f : X ⟶ Y) (g : Y ⟶ Z), toPrefunctor✝.map (f ≫ g) = toPrefunctor✝.map f ≫ toPrefunctor✝.map g

α : Type u_1
l : Ordnode α
x : α
r : Ordnode α
hl : l.Balanced
hr : r.Balanced
sl : l.Sized
sr : r.Sized
H : (∃ l', Raised l.size l' ∧ BalancedSz l' r.size) ∨ ∃ r', Raised r' r.size ∧ BalancedSz l.size r'
⊢ Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id l = t → Ordnode α) (id l)
      (fun h =>
        Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id r = t → Ordnode α) (id r) (fun h => Ordnode.singleton x)
          (fun rs rl rx rr h =>
            Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rr = t → Ordnode α) (id rr)
              (fun h =>
                Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => rl = t → Ordnode α) rl (fun h => node 2 nil x r)
                  (fun size l rlx r h => node 3 (Ordnode.singleton x) rlx (Ordnode.singleton rx)) ⋯)
              (fun rrs l x_1 r h =>
                Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rl = t → Ordnode α) (id rl)
                  (fun h => node 3 (Ordnode.singleton x) rx rr)
                  (fun rls rll rlx rlr h =>
                    if rls < ratio * rrs then node (rs + 1) (node (rls + 1) nil x rl) rx rr
                    else node (rs + 1) (node (rll.size + 1) nil x rll) rlx (node (rlr.size + rrs + 1) rlr rx rr))
                  ⋯)
              ⋯)
          ⋯)
      (fun ls l_1 x_1 r_1 h =>
        Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id r = t → Ordnode α) (id r) (fun h => node (ls + 1) l x nil)
          (fun rs rl rx rr h =>
            if rs > delta * ls then
              Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rr = t → Ordnode α) (id rr) (fun h => nil)
                (fun rrs l_2 x_2 r h =>
                  Ordnode.casesOn (motive := fun t => id rl = t → Ordnode α) (id rl) (fun h => nil)
                    (fun rls rll rlx rlr h =>
                      if rls < ratio * rrs then node (ls + rs + 1) (node (ls + rls + 1) l x rl) rx rr
                      else
                        node (ls + rs + 1) (node (ls + rll.size + 1) l x rll) rlx (node (rlr.size + rrs + 1) rlr rx rr))
                    ⋯)
                ⋯
            else node (ls + rs + 1) l x r)
          ⋯)
      ⋯ =
    l.balance' x r

α : Type u_1
l : Ordnode α
x : α
r : Ordnode α
hl : l.Balanced
hr : r.Balanced
sl : l.Sized
sr : r.Sized
H : (∃ l', Raised l.size l' ∧ BalancedSz l' r.size) ∨ ∃ r', Raised r' r.size ∧ BalancedSz l.size r'
⊢ rec (motive := fun t => l = t → Ordnode α)
      (fun h =>
        rec (motive := fun t => r = t → Ordnode α) (fun h => Ordnode.singleton x)
          (fun size l x_1 r_1 l_ih r_ih h =>
            rec (motive := fun t => r_1 = t → Ordnode α)
              (fun h =>
                rec (motive := fun t => l = t → Ordnode α) (fun h => node 2 nil x r)
                  (fun size l_1 x_2 r l_ih r_ih h => node 3 (Ordnode.singleton x) x_2 (Ordnode.singleton x_1)) l ⋯)
              (fun size_1 l_1 x_2 r l_ih r_ih h =>
                rec (motive := fun t => l = t → Ordnode α) (fun h => node 3 (Ordnode.singleton x) x_1 r_1)
                  (fun size_2 l_2 x_3 r l_ih r_ih h =>
                    if size_2 < ratio * size_1 then node (size + 1) (node (size_2 + 1) nil x l) x_1 r_1
                    else node (size + 1) (node (l_2.size + 1) nil x l_2) x_3 (node (r.size + size_1 + 1) r x_1 r_1))
                  l ⋯)
              r_1 ⋯)
          r ⋯)
      (fun size l_1 x_1 r_1 l_ih r_ih h =>
        rec (motive := fun t => r = t → Ordnode α) (fun h => node (size + 1) l x nil)
          (fun size_1 l_2 x_2 r_2 l_ih r_ih h =>
            if delta * size < size_1 then
              rec (motive := fun t => r_2 = t → Ordnode α) (fun h => nil)
                (fun size_2 l_3 x_3 r l_ih r_ih h =>
                  rec (motive := fun t => l_2 = t → Ordnode α) (fun h => nil)
                    (fun size_3 l_4 x_4 r l_ih r_ih h =>
                      if size_3 < ratio * size_2 then
                        node (size + size_1 + 1) (node (size + size_3 + 1) l x l_2) x_2 r_2
                      else
                        node (size + size_1 + 1) (node (size + l_4.size + 1) l x l_4) x_4
                          (node (r.size + size_2 + 1) r x_2 r_2))
                    l_2 ⋯)
                r_2 ⋯
            else node (size + size_1 + 1) l x r)
          r ⋯)
      l ⋯ =
    l.balance' x r

      (fun h =>
        rec (motive := fun t => r = t → Ordnode α) (fun h => Ordnode.singleton x)
          (fun size l x_1 r_1 l_ih r_ih h =>
            rec (motive := fun t => r_1 = t → Ordnode α)

                  (fun size l_1 x_2 r l_ih r_ih h => node 3 (Ordnode.singleton x) x_2 (Ordnode.singleton x_1)) l ⋯)
              (fun size_1 l_1 x_2 r l_ih r_ih h =>

                  (fun size_2 l_2 x_3 r l_ih r_ih h =>

      (fun size l_1 x_1 r_1 l_ih r_ih h =>

          (fun size_1 l_2 x_2 r_2 l_ih r_ih h =>
            if size_1 > delta * size then

                (fun size_2 l_3 x_3 r l_ih r_ih h =>

                          (node (r.size + size_2 + 1) r x_2 r_2))
